chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-706 of 2021 CP No.D-5136 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.10. 2. For orders on CMA No.2904/2021. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 20.12.2024 Mr. Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the petitioner in C.P. No.D-706/2021. Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner in C.P. No.D-5136/2020. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly proposed that this Petition may be disposed of as follows: i. The petitioner shall respond to the show-cause notice before the department and raise all defenses available thereto. ii. The department shall determine the show-cause notice after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. iii. The department shall determine the show cause notice vide a speaking order and pending such determination, no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. These Petitions are disposed of as aforesaid. Office to place a copy hereof in the connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
